name: Ledge Card Stand

product_dna.core_purpose: Hold a place card, photograph, small print, or daily note.
product_dna.design_philosophy: A low architectural plinth lets the displayed item remain primary.
product_dna.emotional_appeal: Makes a small message or image feel intentional.
product_dna.target_customer: Desk users, gift buyers, hosts, and small-space decorators.
product_dna.functional_benefits: Interchangeable display with little surface area.
product_dna.decorative_benefits: Quiet arched notch and grounded plinth.
product_dna.print_complexity: Low to moderate; slot clearance and balance need prototypes.
product_dna.material_efficiency: Small solid part with measurable low resin volume.
product_dna.future_evolution: Single, pair, menu, photo, and commercial event editions.
product_dna.physical_manufacturing_potential: Suitable for small-batch resin or mineral-composite production after stability tests.

design_tokens.edge_language: Low horizontal ledge and one precise slot

market_demand.rationale: EVD-009 states that direct card-stand market evidence is Unknown; EVD-003 offers only shelf-decor adjacency.

competition_opportunity.rationale: EVD-009 marks competition evidence Unknown, so the score reflects a provisional opening rather than a measured gap.

profitability.rationale: EVD-009 marks cost and willingness-to-pay evidence Unknown; compact geometry suggests low material exposure only.

evergreen_potential.rationale: EVD-003 shows ongoing shelf and gift contexts, but direct card-display evidence is Unknown.

brand_alignment.rationale: EVD-009 marks market validation Unknown; the low plinth and restrained slot fit internal brand rules.

collection_potential.rationale: EVD-003 and EVD-004 show shelf, vanity, and entryway contexts compatible with a display role.

bundle_potential.rationale: EVD-007 demonstrates collection packaging; a small stand adds a distinct function to the bundle.

physical_product_potential.rationale: EVD-009 marks direct physical demand Unknown; compact solid geometry is operationally plausible.

seo_opportunity.rationale: EVD-009 confirms direct keyword evidence is Unknown.

resin_printability.rationale: EVD-009 marks validation Unknown; small solid geometry appears suitable pending clearance and balance tests.

ai_production_efficiency.rationale: EVD-009 marks production evidence Unknown; the part can be built parametrically with few features.

customer_value.rationale: EVD-003 supports shelf and gift adjacency, while the multi-use display claim remains a hypothesis.

production_simplicity.rationale: EVD-009 marks resin evidence Unknown; a small single part should need limited supports if oriented well.

marketplace_fit.rationale: EVD-003 provides Etsy adjacency; direct Cults3D category evidence is Unknown in EVD-009.

improvement_actions: Research card and photo stand STL listings
